smells.title: Unclassified (Needs triage)
smells.description: Temporary bucket for cases where we haven't identified a specific review smell yet.
smells.why_risky: Without a concrete smell, reviewers have no actionable checklist to catch similar flakiness patterns early.
review_questions: What makes this test non-deterministic, and how can we make it deterministic?
suggested_fixes: Identify the flakiness trigger and document the evidence in the case.
Add deterministic synchronization/ordering/timeout handling as appropriate for the existing test or test infrastructure.
